status_legend.active: The one feature currently being worked.
status_legend.blocked: Progress is stopped by a documented blocker.
status_legend.passing: Verification passed and evidence is recorded.

features.title: Cross-platform harness CLI and Action
features.user_visible_behavior: Users can generate, audit, and safely update repo harness artifacts locally or through the GitHub Action.
verification: init creates missing harness artifacts without overwriting existing files by default
audit scores the practical harness domains and returns actionable recommendations
update applies only safe missing-file corrections unless forced
doctor checks Python and host platform compatibility
the root GitHub Action runs the same library code as the CLI
evidence: 2026-06-14: Local POSIX and PowerShell entrypoints passed with 38 unit tests, pin check, and self-audit 100/100.
2026-06-14: Isolated package install smoke passed; installed init included component and research starter files.
2026-06-14: Current unit suite passes with 46 tests; pin check passes; self-audit is 100/100.
2026-06-14: Research source ledger refreshed with 49 sources and one recorded 403 fetch failure.
2026-06-14: README research pass completed against GitHub Docs, The Turing Way, OpenSSF Scorecard, and widely used project READMEs.
2026-06-14: Root Action manifest colon-description regression test added after hosted CI rejected the unquoted manifest value.
2026-06-14: Root, template, and generated AGENTS.md files verified against the required five-section format.
2026-06-14: Detection ignores root manifest symlinks outside the target repo; Action runtime sets PYTHONSAFEPATH; redaction covers home paths with spaces and the current home path.
2026-06-14: Research refresh rejects non-HTTPS URLs, credentials, localhost, and literal non-public IP targets before fetching.
2026-06-14: GitHub Action report paths must be target-relative and resolve inside the target repository.
2026-06-14: GitHub Action report outputs use slash-separated target-relative paths across Windows and POSIX runners.
2026-06-14: Research refresh validates DNS resolutions and redirects before fetching public sources.
2026-06-14: Read-only CI checkout opts out of persisted credentials.
2026-06-14: POSIX and PowerShell entrypoints pass with 46 tests and self-audit 100/100 after the current hardening pass.
2026-06-14: Root POSIX entrypoint prepends src when PYTHONPATH is already set; polluted-environment verification passed with 47 tests and self-audit 100/100.
2026-06-14: POSIX and PowerShell entrypoints pass with 47 tests and self-audit 100/100 after the entrypoint fix.
2026-06-14: Hosted CI run 27490215814 passed on main for commit fda509a across Ubuntu 22.04, macOS 15, and Windows 2025 on Python 3.13.14 and 3.14.6.
2026-06-14: CLI bare invocation returns usage error, generated scripts normalize python3 commands, and research refresh accepts validated relative redirects; focused tests passed.
2026-06-14: Current unit suite passes with 50 tests after the latest ease/security fix slice.
2026-06-14: POSIX and PowerShell entrypoints pass with 50 tests, pin check, and self-audit 100/100 after the current ease/security fix slice.
2026-06-14: GitHub Action outputs use delimiter blocks for GITHUB_OUTPUT; focused Action tests passed.
2026-06-14: POSIX and PowerShell entrypoints pass with 50 tests, pin check, and self-audit 100/100 after delimiter-output hardening.
2026-06-14: CI matrix now uses the explicit windows-2025-vs2026 runner label ahead of the June 15, 2026 windows-2025 redirect.
2026-06-14: Research refresh connects HTTPS fetches to validated public DNS results while preserving TLS host verification; focused refresh tests passed.
2026-06-14: POSIX and PowerShell entrypoints pass with 52 tests, pin check, and self-audit 100/100 after research-refresh transport hardening.
2026-06-14: Shared path handling rejects POSIX and Windows absolute/rooted syntax for Action report paths and audit checks; focused path tests passed.
2026-06-14: POSIX and PowerShell entrypoints pass with 54 tests, pin check, and self-audit 100/100 after cross-platform path-containment hardening.
features.notes: Prior pushed CI passed; current path-containment hardening passes focused, full unit, pin, POSIX, and PowerShell verification.
